task_name: Not an FLS task performance video
confidence_rationale: Video is a research presentation slide deck on implementation of laparoscopic simulation programs in the Dominican Republic. Contains no actual FLS task performance footage, no trainee performing peg transfer, pattern cut, endoloop, or suture tasks. Frames show title slides, introduction, methods, results graphs, and conclusions. This is educational/conference presentation material, not scoreable FLS performance.
cannot_determine: Task performance metrics — no task was performed
Completion times — no live task execution visible

teaching_content.presentation_context: Research presentation on successful integration of laparoscopic simulation center in Dominican Republic, reporting pre/post improvements in resident performance on three FLS tasks: peg transfer, precision cutting, and intracorporeal knot tying. Study shows statistically significant improvements in cutting and knot tying tasks (p<0.01 and p=0.02 respectively) but no significant improvement in peg transfer times. 85% resident participation with mean 25 hours of supervised practice.

notes: This video is a SAGES conference presentation slide deck documenting a research study. It is not a performance video and contains no scoreable FLS task execution. No proctor scoring is applicable.
